result.stdout:
Description:
  Allintra tool to assist the development environment, helping developers follow Allintra's architectural standards for building API and packages

Usage:
  Allintra.Dev.Authenticator [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help    Show help and usage information
  --version         Show version information
  --ignore-version  Use in any command to ignores the version check, skipping update notification even when a newer version is available

Commands:
  api            Manage API's from Allintra on your local machine.
  app            Manage localhost services for an application.
  auth           Clears the current authentication and authenticates again. With --token option, it will print the token of authentication.
  clean          Removes all containers with label 'allintra', deletes logs folders and database include your authentication in your environment
  cloud-builder  Command for building and deploying to the cloud
  infra          Manages Allintra infrastructure for you development environment.
  package        Manage packages project from Allintra on your local machine.
  site           Manage Sites Allintra on your local machine.
  stop           Stops all containers of Allintra
  wasm           Run Allintra WebAssembly Documentation on your local machine.

commands.payload:
Description:
  Allintra tool to assist the development environment, helping developers follow Allintra's architectural standards for building API and packages

Usage:
  Allintra.Dev.Authenticator [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help    Show help and usage information
  --version         Show version information
  --ignore-version  Use in any command to ignores the version check, skipping update notification even when a newer version is available

Commands:
  api            Manage API's from Allintra on your local machine.
  app            Manage localhost services for an application.
  auth           Clears the current authentication and authenticates again. With --token option, it will print the token of authentication.
  clean          Removes all containers with label 'allintra', deletes logs folders and database include your authentication in your environment
  cloud-builder  Command for building and deploying to the cloud
  infra          Manages Allintra infrastructure for you development environment.
  package        Manage packages project from Allintra on your local machine.
  site           Manage Sites Allintra on your local machine.
  stop           Stops all containers of Allintra
  wasm           Run Allintra WebAssembly Documentation on your local machine.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Manage API's from Allintra on your local machine.

Usage:
  Allintra.Dev.Authenticator api [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  start <repository>  Try to start a API from a repository.
  run                 Run the Allintra API on current folder.
  set                 Sets the current folder as an Allintra API.
  clean               Stops and removes all containers (including volumes) using for building API`s and infra for Allintra in your local machine.
  add <name>          Add another application of this API, as an API extension.
  variables <API>     Get run time repository variables from a API

  clean               Stops and removes all containers (including volumes) using for building API`s and infra for Allintra in your local machine.
  add <name>          Add another application of this API, as an API extension.
  variables <API>     Get run time repository variables from a API

result.stdout:
Description:
  Try to start a API from a repository.

Usage:
  Allintra.Dev.Authenticator api start <repository> [options]

Arguments:
  <repository>  The repository to be executed as API.

Options:
  --source        The name of the branch, commit and tag for which you want to use the repository API. If this option is not passed, the default branch will be used.
  --d             Run the container in the background and print new container id.
  --noCognito     Run with authentatication token "allintra" without validation with cognito
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Try to start a API from a repository.

Usage:
  Allintra.Dev.Authenticator api start <repository> [options]

Arguments:
  <repository>  The repository to be executed as API.

Options:
  --source        The name of the branch, commit and tag for which you want to use the repository API. If this option is not passed, the default branch will be used.
  --d             Run the container in the background and print new container id.
  --noCognito     Run with authentatication token "allintra" without validation with cognito
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Manage localhost services for an application.

Usage:
  Allintra.Dev.Authenticator app [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  add <repository>                        Adds a new service to the allintra-services.json on your app and build the client packages for that service according to the configurations.
  run                                     Run all services from an allintra-services.json file on your app.
  set <Backoffice|Mobile|Web> <Npm|Yarn>  Set the application type
  update                                  Update all packages from services on allintra-services.json file.

commands.payload:
Description:
  Manage localhost services for an application.

Usage:
  Allintra.Dev.Authenticator app [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  add <repository>                        Adds a new service to the allintra-services.json on your app and build the client packages for that service according to the configurations.
  run                                     Run all services from an allintra-services.json file on your app.
  set <Backoffice|Mobile|Web> <Npm|Yarn>  Set the application type
  update                                  Update all packages from services on allintra-services.json file.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Adds a new service to the allintra-services.json on your app and build the client packages for that service according to the configurations.

Usage:
  Allintra.Dev.Authenticator app add <repository> [options]

Arguments:
  <repository>  The repository of the API.

Options:
  --source        The name of the branch, commit and tag for which you want to use the repository API. If this option is not passed, the default branch will be used.
  --timeout       After up the service, how long in seconds should it take for the service to respond with an OpenApi object? The default value is 30 seconds.
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Clears the current authentication and authenticates again. With --token option, it will print the token of authentication.

Usage:
  Allintra.Dev.Authenticator auth [options]

Options:
  --token               Print the token of authentication.
  --only-get            Only get the token of actual authentication.
  --set-packages-token  Set the token of packages repository.
  --set-git-token       Set the token of git repository.
  -?, -h, --help        Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Manages Allintra infrastructure for you development environment.

Usage:
  Allintra.Dev.Authenticator infra [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  add <infra>         Adds a infrastructure for service on current folder
  host <api> <infra>  Start an infrastructure for a API running on host
  proxy <api>         Creates a container for the API whose objective is to redirect traffic from other services accessing the container to the service hosted on the host.
  set                 Sets allintra-deploy.json in the current folder as an infrastructure project

  host <api> <infra>  Start an infrastructure for a API running on host
  proxy <api>         Creates a container for the API whose objective is to redirect traffic from other services accessing the container to the service hosted on the host.
  set                 Sets allintra-deploy.json in the current folder as an infrastructure project

result.stdout:
Description:
  Start an infrastructure for a API running on host

Usage:
  Allintra.Dev.Authenticator infra host <api> <infra> [options]

Arguments:
  <api>    The name of the API that has the infrastructure initialized
  <infra>  The name of the infrastructure to be started

Options:
  --source        The name of the branch, commit or tag for which you want to use the repository of the infrastructure. If this option is not passed, the default branch will be used.
  --share         Share resources with other API's
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Start an infrastructure for a API running on host

Usage:
  Allintra.Dev.Authenticator infra host <api> <infra> [options]

Arguments:
  <api>    The name of the API that has the infrastructure initialized
  <infra>  The name of the infrastructure to be started

Options:
  --source        The name of the branch, commit or tag for which you want to use the repository of the infrastructure. If this option is not passed, the default branch will be used.
  --share         Share resources with other API's
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
